overview.label: Tarot
overview.value: II The High Priestess · XVIII The Moon

related.name: XVIII. The Moon
related.teaser: The Moon is the dream-lens of the unconscious, a shimmering path of illusion and initiation.

related.name: Moonstone
related.teaser: Sacral is the river—pleasure, creation, and the moon’s pull in the blood.

related.name: Yemaya
related.teaser: Sacral is the womb of becoming — water’s embrace, desire’s tide, the dance of creation.

related.name: ♆ Neptune
related.teaser: Neptune is the ocean of spirit — dream wave, mystic tide, abyss of compassion.

related.name: II. The High Priestess
related.teaser: The High Priestess veils and unveils — water of intuition reflecting the unspoken truths.

related.name: ☽ Moon
related.teaser: The Moon is the tide of psyche — dream mirror, womb of waters, keeper of illusion.

related.name: Chandra
related.teaser: Chandra milk of night — tides breathing thought, dreams drawn in silver.
